_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to operate the organization's LAN/WAN pathways.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.456), DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.454).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.9/10 (raw 0.389). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [lan, operate, organization, pathways, s, wan] vs WIDAI-only terms [build, business, cross, data, delivery, effective] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.881, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.028 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to operate the organization's LAN/WAN pathways." and "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.463 > STS 0.389 (gap +0.074). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [lan, operate, organization, pathways, s, wan]. WIDAI-only: [build, business, cross, data, delivery, effective].
